languages.text: "Эй, я тут готовить пытаюсь... А это вы, Ваша Светлость, умолкаю, умолкаю..."
"Hey, I'm trying to cook here — Oh, it's you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Just keeping quiet now, keeping quiet..."
languages.original_text: "Эй, я тут готовить пытаюсь... А это вы, Ваша Светлость, умолкаю, умолкаю..."

traits.locale_text: ""Hey, I'm trying to cook here... Oh, it's you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, keeping quiet now, keeping quiet..."
""Hey, I'm trying to cook here... Oh, it's you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, keeping quiet now, keeping quiet..."
"Hey, I'm trying to cook here — Oh, it's you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Just keeping quiet now, keeping quiet..."
"Hey, I'm trying to cook here — Oh, it's you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Just keeping quiet now, keeping quiet..."

languages.text: “嘿，我这儿正做饭呢——哦，是您啊，大人。我这就闭嘴，这就闭嘴……”
languages.original_text: "Hey, I'm trying to cook here — Oh, it's you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Just keeping quiet now, keeping quiet..."

traits.locale_text: “嘿，我这儿正做饭呢——哦，是您啊，大人。我这就闭嘴，这就闭嘴……”

languages.text: "Burada yemek yapmaya çalışıyorum be... Aa, siz miydiniz {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri? Hemen susuyorum. Ağzımı açmıyorum..."
languages.original_text: "Hey, I'm trying to cook here — Oh, it's you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Just keeping quiet now, keeping quiet..."

traits.locale_text: "Burada yemek yapmaya çalışıyorum be... Aa, siz miydiniz {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri? Hemen susuyorum. Ağzımı açmıyorum..."

languages.text: « Hé, j'essaie de cuisiner, là... Oh, c'est vous, Votre Seigneurie. Je vais me taire maintenant, ne faites pas attention à moi... »
languages.original_text: "Hey, I'm trying to cook here — Oh, it's you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Just keeping quiet now, keeping quiet..."

traits.locale_text: « Hé, j'essaie de cuisiner, là... Oh, c'est vous, Votre Seigneurie. Je vais me taire maintenant, ne faites pas attention à moi... »

languages.text: «¡Eh, que estoy intentando cocinar!... Oh, es usted, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Me callo, me callo...».
languages.original_text: "Hey, I'm trying to cook here — Oh, it's you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Just keeping quiet now, keeping quiet..."

traits.locale_text: «¡Eh, que estoy intentando cocinar!... Oh, es usted, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Me callo, me callo...».

languages.text: "Hey, ich versuche hier zu kochen — Oh, Ihr seid es, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Ich habe nicht gesagt, bin ganz still ..."
languages.original_text: "Hey, I'm trying to cook here — Oh, it's you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Just keeping quiet now, keeping quiet..."

traits.locale_text: "Hey, ich versuche hier zu kochen — Oh, Ihr seid es, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Ich habe nicht gesagt, bin ganz still ..."

languages.text: 「おい、こっちは料理中なんだ――ああ、あなたですか、{mf|閣下|閣下}。今すぐ黙ります、黙りますとも……」
languages.original_text: "Hey, I'm trying to cook here — Oh, it's you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Just keeping quiet now, keeping quiet..."

traits.locale_text: 「おい、こっちは料理中なんだ――ああ、あなたですか、{mf|閣下|閣下}。今すぐ黙ります、黙りますとも……」
